calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Regarding Validity Of The Trust Amendment And For Status On Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Field for Jonda Miller (Successor Trustee).

Ms. Field presented an Ex Parte request for waiver of notice to Robin Albert which the Court granted, (signing the order for the same in open court). The Court also signed the Order Terminating The Trust Determining That Trust Amendment Is Invalid.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Guitron.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 284923 (Conservatorship of Shirley Mae Miller).

Appearances: Nancy Field for and with Jonda Miller (Petitioner). Charles Koss for the Shadow Mountain Community Church (Objector).

With regard to the Conservatorship, the Court stated that it would approve the accounting and the attorney's fees, but that the other issues were not before the court. Ms. Field stated that there was only $8,000.00 in the conservatorship and that after the fees were paid, there would be nothing left to transfer to the trust. The matter was taken under submission for review of the order.

With regard to the trust, Ms. Field provided a copy of the filed declaration of Dr. Nievod, stated that Dr. Nievod had evaluated the Conservatee twice and found that the Conservatee lacked testamentary and contractual capacity. Mr. Koss stated that his client had not been notified and that he needed time to do discovery to see if in fact the Conservatee lacked capacity. Ms. Field stated that she was not aware of the amendment to the trust until the time of death of the Conservatee, that service was done on the Church on June 8th, that she provided a copy of the petition and that the Settlor had been under a conservatorship since September of 2003. The issue regarding validity of the trust amendment and status on discovery was set for August 18, 2008. The accounting and the request for fees were taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
